items.title: California’s Dying Bullet Train Is A Preview Of A Newsom Presidency
items.description: California's high-speed rail project, approved in 2008 and under construction since 2015, is running out of money and time, while failing.

items.title: Michigan’s Dirty And Dead-Ridden Voter Rolls Escape Scrutiny
items.description: The Supreme Court this week passed on a watchdog's request to review lower court decisions finding Michigan's voter list clean enough.

items.title: 14 Pro-Life Alternatives To IVF For Infertile Couples Who Desire Children
items.description: As couples increasingly question IVF ethics, they are seeking better options. Here are 14 to consider.

items.title: Democrat Bill Would Flood Every School, Church, And Hospital With Illegal Squatters
items.description: Union bosses support this reckless policy because they are more concerned with politics than with protecting teachers and students.

items.title: Why You Should Probably Be More Prejudiced
items.description: Prejudice is an inescapable concept. We all have prejudices. The question is, are they the right ones?
